_disclaimer: DEMO CONTENT — synthetic data for local development and demos only. Not derived from real assessments.
title: Kubernetes Security Baseline
content:
title: Kubernetes Security Baseline
metadata:
  type: Policy
  id: kube-security-baseline
  version: 1.0.0
  gemara-version: 1.0.0
  description: >-
    Security baseline for Kubernetes clusters covering pod security,
    network policy, image signing, RBAC, and secrets encryption.
  author:
    id: complytime
    name: ComplyTime
    type: Software Assisted
  mapping-references:
    - id: kube-security-controls
      title: Kubernetes Security Controls
      version: 1.0.0
      description: Control catalog for Kubernetes security hardening

contacts:
  responsible:
    - name: Platform Team
  accountable:
    - name: Security Team

scope:
  in:
    technologies:
      - Kubernetes
    users:
      - Platform engineers

criteria:
  - id: KSB-1
    title: Enforce Pod Security Standards
    description: Pods must conform to the Restricted pod security standard.
    catalog-ref: kube-security-controls/KSB-1
    assessment-requirements:
      - id: KSB-1.01
        description: Namespaces MUST enforce the Restricted pod security standard via admission control.
        frequency: daily

  - id: KSB-2
    title: Require Network Policies
    description: Every namespace must have a default-deny NetworkPolicy.
    catalog-ref: kube-security-controls/KSB-2
    assessment-requirements:
      - id: KSB-2.01
        description: A default-deny ingress NetworkPolicy MUST exist in each namespace.
        frequency: daily

  - id: KSB-3
    title: Require Image Signing
    description: Only signed container images may be admitted to the cluster.
    catalog-ref: kube-security-controls/KSB-3
    assessment-requirements:
      - id: KSB-3.01
        description: Admission controller MUST reject unsigned images.
        frequency: daily

  - id: KSB-4
    title: Enforce Least-Privilege RBAC
    description: ClusterRoleBindings must follow least-privilege.
    catalog-ref: kube-security-controls/KSB-4
    assessment-requirements:
      - id: KSB-4.01
        description: No ClusterRoleBinding SHOULD grant cluster-admin to service accounts.
        frequency: weekly

  - id: KSB-5
    title: Encrypt Secrets at Rest
    description: Kubernetes secrets must be encrypted at rest using a KMS provider.
    catalog-ref: kube-security-controls/KSB-5
    assessment-requirements:
      - id: KSB-5.01
        description: EncryptionConfiguration MUST use a KMS provider for secrets.
        frequency: weekly

adherence:
  evaluation-methods:
    - type: Gate
      description: Kyverno policy engine enforcement and Trivy cluster scanning
      executor:
        id: kyverno
        name: Kyverno
        type: Software
  assessment-plans:
    - id: KSB-1.01
      requirement-id: KSB-1.01
      frequency: daily
      evaluation-methods:
        - type: Gate
          executor:
            id: kyverno
    - id: KSB-2.01
      requirement-id: KSB-2.01
      frequency: daily
      evaluation-methods:
        - type: Gate
          executor:
            id: kyverno
    - id: KSB-3.01
      requirement-id: KSB-3.01
      frequency: daily
      evaluation-methods:
        - type: Gate
          executor:
            id: kyverno
    - id: KSB-4.01
      requirement-id: KSB-4.01
      frequency: weekly
      evaluation-methods:
        - type: Gate
          executor:
            id: kyverno
    - id: KSB-5.01
      requirement-id: KSB-5.01
      frequency: weekly
      evaluation-methods:
        - type: Gate
          executor:
            id: kyverno
